Application.featuresString: DISCOVER_SCHEMA, PROVISIONING, SYNC_PROVISIONING, DIRECT_PERMISSIONS, SEARCH, ENABLE, UNLOCK
Application.name: Invision

entry.value: select a.accountno ,firstname FName,MidInit MName,lastname LName,empID EmpID,a.tpx_id GenTPXID,a2k_id GenA2KID,a2k_pw GenA2KPW,DateAdded ,DateDeactivated ,Comments ReqComment,CostCenter ,recID RecID,lastRecID , EmpPhone Phone,empEmail EMail,EmpTitle JobTitle,EmpSite EmplSite,ReqDate ,reqFName ReqFName,reqLname ReqLName,ReqEMail ,ApprID ApproveUserID,mailCode BundlMailCode,bundl NeedBundl,jbundl NeedJBundl, spool NeedSpool,NetView NeedNetView,thin NeedThin,tso NeedTSO,username UserName ,a.DateUpdated ,LegacyEmpID, ProdT40 NeedT40, InvIDT40 , ProdS48 NeedD48, InvIDS48 , ProdM45 NeedM45, InvIDM45, ProdH48 NeedH48, InvIDH48 , ProdP48 NeedP48, InvIDP48, ProdS48 NeedS48, InvIDS48, ISNULL(entitlementT40,'') + ','+ISNULL(entitlementM45,'') + ','+ISNULL(entitlementP48,'') + ','+ISNULL(entitlementH48,'') + ','+ISNULL(entitlementS48 ,'') + ','+ISNULL(entitlementD48,'') + ','+ISNULL(testEntitlementD48,'') + ','+ISNULL(testEntitlementT40,'') + ','+ISNULL(testEntitlementM45,'') + ','+ISNULL(testEntitlementH48,'') + ','+ISNULL(testEntitlementP48,'') + ','+ISNULL(testEntitlementS48,'') as entitlement from TPXAccounts a left join invSailpoint b on b.accountno = a.accountno Where username is not NULL order by a.username;
select * from InvisionRequests Where entitlement <> '' AND entitlement is not null
select * from InvisionRequests Where entitlement <> '' AND entitlement is not null
Create, Modify, Delete, Enable, Disable, Unlock

select a.accountno ,firstname FName,MidInit MName,lastname LName,empID EmpID,a.tpx_id GenTPXID,a2k_id GenA2KID,a2k_pw GenA2KPW,DateAdded ,DateDeactivated ,Comments ReqComment,CostCenter ,recID RecID,lastRecID , EmpPhone Phone,empEmail EMail,EmpTitle JobTitle,EmpSite EmplSite,ReqDate ,reqFName ReqFName,reqLname ReqLName,ReqEMail ,ApprID ApproveUserID,mailCode BundlMailCode,bundl NeedBundl,jbundl NeedJBundl, spool NeedSpool,NetView NeedNetView,thin NeedThin,tso NeedTSO,username UserName ,a.DateUpdated ,LegacyEmpID, ProdT40 NeedT40, InvIDT40 , ProdS48 NeedD48, InvIDS48 , ProdM45 NeedM45, InvIDM45, ProdH48 NeedH48, InvIDH48 , ProdP48 NeedP48, InvIDP48, ProdS48 NeedS48, InvIDS48, ISNULL(entitlementT40,'') + ','+ISNULL(entitlementM45,'') + ','+ISNULL(entitlementP48,'') + ','+ISNULL(entitlementH48,'') + ','+ISNULL(entitlementS48 ,'') + ','+ISNULL(entitlementD48,'') + ','+ISNULL(testEntitlementD48,'') + ','+ISNULL(testEntitlementT40,'') + ','+ISNULL(testEntitlementM45,'') + ','+ISNULL(testEntitlementH48,'') + ','+ISNULL(testEntitlementP48,'') + ','+ISNULL(testEntitlementS48,'') as entitlement from TPXAccounts a left join invSailpoint b on b.accountno = a.accountno Where username is not NULL order by a.username;

Form.name: Ascension-Form-Invision-CreatePolicy
Form.Description: Create policy form for invision application
